description: Meetup is a platform for finding and building local and online communities through groups and events. Organizers use it to run communities and events, while members use it to discover, join, and attend them.
summary: Meetup exposes a GraphQL API at `https://api.meetup.com/gql-ext` authenticated with Meetup-issued OAuth 2 access tokens, plus a public MCP server at `https://chatgpt-app.meetup.com/mcp` over SSE.
